text:
Created attachment 207743
go-ethereum-1.9.5.diff

Upgrades go-ethereum to version 1.9.5


Notable changes:
- locks in the Istanbul hard fork block numbers for the Ropsten, Rinkeby and Görli test networks

Releases:
- https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/releases/tag/v1.9.4
- https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/releases/tag/v1.9.5
